TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Seediq, story: sdqNr-south_pawan 2021s
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: yaku cbeyo a kndalaxku a a mnsenengku hini cbeyo a.
S.PHON: jaku ʦbejo a kndalaxku a a mnseneŋku ħini ʦbejo a.
S.FORM: yaku cbeyo a kndalaxku a a mnsenengku hini cbeyo a.
S.PHON: jaku ʦbejo a kndalaxku a a mnseneŋku ħini ʦbejo a.
S.TRANSL: 我從前在這裡長成青年.
Long time ago, I grew up to be a young man here.

S.FORM: junanasaiku musa a musa a sigang musa hetai na tanah tunux.
S.PHON: junanasaiku musa a musa a sigaŋ musa ħetai na tanaħ tunux.
S.FORM: junanasaiku musa a musa a sigang musa hetai na tanah tunux.
S.PHON: junanasaiku musa a musa a sigaŋ musa ħetai na tanaħ tunux.
S.TRANSL: 我十七歲的時候自願加入日本軍隊.
When I was seventeen, I volunteered to join the Japanese army.

S.FORM: ma mosanami a mosaku a sigang a hetaidaha kaigung.
S.PHON: ma mosanami a mosaku a sigaŋ a ħetaidaħa kaiguŋ.
S.FORM: ma mosanami a mosaku a sigang a hetaidaha kaigung.
S.PHON: ma mosanami a mosaku a sigaŋ a ħetaidaħa kaiguŋ.
S.TRANSL: 然後我加入了他們自願軍中的海軍陸戰隊.
Then I joined the marine corps of their voluteer force.

S.FORM: sangkagecuku ka kungdeng moda tai a kungdeng taicu.
S.PHON: saŋkageʦuku ka kuŋdeŋ moda tai a kuŋdeŋ taiʦu.
S.FORM: sangkagecuku ka kungdeng moda tai a kungdeng taicu.
S.PHON: saŋkageʦuku ka kuŋdeŋ moda tai a kuŋdeŋ taiʦu.
S.TRANSL: 我去台中訓練了三個月.
I went to Taichung for training for three months.

S.FORM: kiya kndalaxmiyan taywang hini musamiyan takao di ma.
S.PHON: kija kndalaxmijan tajwaŋ ħini musamijan takao di ma.
S.FORM: kiya kndalaxmiyan taywang hini musamiyan takao di ma.
S.PHON: kija kndalaxmijan tajwaŋ ħini musamijan takao di ma.
S.TRANSL: 然後我們就從台灣這裡去了高雄.
Then we went to Kaohsiung from Taiwan here.

S.FORM: mudaku hiriping mudaku Hiriping sangkugecu eniqanmu hiriping ma.
S.PHON: mudaku ħiɾipiŋ mudaku ħiɾipiŋ saŋkugeʦu eniqanmu ħiɾipiŋ ma.
S.FORM: mudaku hiriping mudaku Hiriping sangkugecu eniqanmu hiriping ma.
S.PHON: mudaku ħiɾipiŋ mudaku ħiɾipiŋ saŋkugeʦu eniqanmu ħiɾipiŋ ma.
S.TRANSL: 我們經過菲律賓,而且在那裡待了三個月.
We passed the Philippines and stayed there for three months.

S.FORM: a mudamiyan parao kndalax a parao do musamiyan raboru.
S.PHON: a mudamijan paɾao kndalax a paɾao do musamijan ɾaboɾu.
S.FORM: a mudamiyan parao kndalax a parao do musamiyan raboru.
S.PHON: a mudamijan paɾao kndalax a paɾao do musamijan ɾaboɾu.
S.TRANSL: 我們經過帛琉,然後從帛琉去了拉包爾.
We passed Palau, and from Palau we went to Rabaul.

S.FORM: kndalaxku raboru musanami a a mswaye hida.
S.PHON: kndalaxku ɾaboɾu musanami a a mswaje ħida.
S.FORM: kndalaxku raboru musanami a a mswaye hida.
S.PHON: kndalaxku ɾaboɾu musanami a a mswaje ħida.
S.TRANSL: 離開拉包爾之後,我們分離了.
Leaving Rabaul, we separated.

S.FORM: mosaku nyuuginiyano Soromonhuto yaku di menaq kana.
S.PHON: mosaku njuuginijano soɾomonħuto jaku di menaq kana.
S.FORM: mosaku nyuuginiyano Soromonhuto yaku di menaq kana.
S.PHON: mosaku njuuginijano soɾomonħuto jaku di menaq kana.
S.TRANSL: 我去新幾內亞附近的索羅門群島,所有的人就留在那裡.
I went to Solomon Islands near New Guineas, and all stayed there.

S.FORM: tnhiqanmu musa da musa da wadamiyan ini pu pqqita da pqqita pqqita di ma.
S.PHON: tnħiqanmu musa da musa da wadamijan ini pu pqqita da pqqita pqqita di ma.
S.FORM: tnhiqanmu musa da musa da wadamiyan ini pu pqqita da pqqita pqqita di ma.
S.PHON: tnħiqanmu musa da musa da wadamijan ini pu pqqita da pqqita pqqita di ma.
S.TRANSL: 跟我一起去的那些人呢,我們再也沒見過了.
As for those who accompanied me there, we have never seen each other since.

S.FORM: menaqku a Soromongungto yaku do betaqku a syowa jyuunananen a syowa nijyuu nannen.
S.PHON: menaqku a soɾomoŋuŋto jaku do betaqku a sjowa jjuunananen a sjowa nijjuu nannen.
S.FORM: menaqku a Soromongungto yaku do betaqku a syowa jyuunananen a syowa nijyuu nannen.
S.PHON: menaqku a soɾomoŋuŋto jaku do betaqku a sjowa jjuunananen a sjowa nijjuu nannen.
S.TRANSL: 我待在索羅門群島一直到昭和十七年,不,昭和二十幾年.

TRANSL.notes: I stayed in Solomon Islands until seventeenth year of Showa (1942), no, until Showa twenty something (around 1945).

S.TRANSL: I stayed in Solomon Islands until seventeenth year of Showa , no, until Showa twenty something .

S.FORM: ma kohoku do sono kndalaxku ciida menaq a hananpo.
S.PHON: ma koħoku do sono kndalaxku ʦiida menaq a ħananpo.
S.FORM: ma kohoku do sono kndalaxku ciida menaq a hananpo.
S.PHON: ma koħoku do sono kndalaxku ʦiida menaq a ħananpo.
S.TRANSL: 然後是就是光復,從那時候我就一直留在南方.
Then it was Restoration. Since then, I had stayed in the south.

S.FORM: tghetunnami so hari qolic a mssdurak ma ma so hari a mgleing ma qduliq so hari qolic.
S.PHON: tgħetunnami so ħaɾi qoliʦ a mssduɾak ma ma so ħaɾi a mgleiŋ ma qduliq so ħaɾi qoliʦ.
S.FORM: tghetunnami so hari qolic a mssdurak ma ma so hari a mgleing ma qduliq so hari qolic.
S.PHON: tgħetunnami so ħaɾi qoliʦ a mssduɾak ma ma so ħaɾi a mgleiŋ ma qduliq so ħaɾi qoliʦ.

TRANSL.notes: 我們就像老鼠被困在那裡.因為被追逐,(我們)像老鼠一樣躲藏起來.

S.TRANSL: 我們就像老鼠被困在那裡.因為被追逐, 像老鼠一樣躲藏起來.

TRANSL.notes: We were stuck there like rats. Being chased, (we) hid and fled, just like rats.

S.TRANSL: We were stuck there like rats. Being chased, hid and fled, just like rats.

S.FORM: ma maanu ppuqiunmiyan menaq hini.
S.PHON: ma maanu ppuqiunmijan menaq ħini.
S.FORM: ma maanu ppuqiunmiyan menaq hini.
S.PHON: ma maanu ppuqiunmijan menaq ħini.
S.TRANSL: 那麼我們在這裡吃什麼?
Then what did we eat when staying here?

S.FORM: menaqmiyan a rima knkawas mekanmiyan pusu moka ma pusu blebun ma yasi.
S.PHON: menaqmijan a ɾima knkawas mekanmijan pusu moka ma pusu blebun ma jasi.
S.FORM: menaqmiyan a rima knkawas mekanmiyan pusu moka ma pusu blebun ma yasi.
S.PHON: menaqmijan a ɾima knkawas mekanmijan pusu moka ma pusu blebun ma jasi.
S.TRANSL: 我們待在那邊五年,我們吃木瓜樹的根、香蕉樹的根和椰子.
We stayed there for five years, and we ate the roots of papaya trees and banana trees, and coconuts.

S.FORM: bobona ciida do musamiyan ma eniqan ka.
S.PHON: bobona ʦiida do musamijan ma eniqan ka.
S.FORM: bobona ciida do musamiyan ma eniqan ka.
S.PHON: bobona ʦiida do musamijan ma eniqan ka.
S.TRANSL: 之後,我們去我們待過的地方.
Afterwards, we went to the place we had stayed.

S.FORM: henu a qyqeyanami osa tmlenga musamiyan tmlenga mekanmiyan boyak di ma.
S.PHON: ħenu a qjqejanami osa tmleŋa musamijan tmleŋa mekanmijan bojak di ma.
S.FORM: henu a qyqeyanami osa tmlenga musamiyan tmlenga mekanmiyan boyak di ma.
S.PHON: ħenu a qjqejanami osa tmleŋa musamijan tmleŋa mekanmijan bojak di ma.
S.TRANSL: 我們用工具去放陷阱,吃野豬.
With tools we set up traps and ate boars.

S.FORM: mhumamiyan sari mhumamiyan bunga ma mhumamiyan kesaba.
S.PHON: mħumamijan saɾi mħumamijan buŋa ma mħumamijan kesaba.
S.FORM: mhumamiyan sari mhumamiyan bunga ma mhumamiyan kesaba.
S.PHON: mħumamijan saɾi mħumamijan buŋa ma mħumamijan kesaba.
S.TRANSL: 然後我們種芋頭,蕃薯和木薯.
We planted taro, sweet potato and cassava.

S.FORM: menaq ka ppuqiunmiyan kiya de skruwa babuy asi a hanguci ribo paru di ma.
S.PHON: menaq ka ppuqiunmijan kija de skɾuwa babuj asi a ħaŋuʦi ɾibo paɾu di ma.
S.FORM: menaq ka ppuqiunmiyan kiya de skruwa babuy asi a hanguci ribo paru di ma.
S.PHON: menaq ka ppuqiunmijan kija de skɾuwa babuj asi a ħaŋuʦi ɾibo paɾu di ma.
S.TRANSL: 我們在那裡吃像豬一樣,一定用大鍋煮.

TRANSL.notes: There we ate like pigs. (We) must cook with big pots.

S.TRANSL: There we ate like pigs. must cook with big pots.

S.FORM: pstihiqi kana so a boyak nga nangannami di ma.
S.PHON: pstiħiqi kana so a bojak ŋa naŋannami di ma.
S.FORM: pstihiqi kana so a boyak nga nangannami di ma.
S.PHON: pstiħiqi kana so a bojak ŋa naŋannami di ma.

TRANSL.notes: 像是把所有東西和獵到的野豬(肉)混在一起.

S.TRANSL: 像是把所有東西和獵到的野豬 混在一起.
Like mixing everything with the boar we caught.

S.FORM: kiya ka wadamiyan mtengi tikuh malu heinami di ge um heinami.
S.PHON: kija ka wadamijan mteŋi tikuħ malu ħeinami di ge um ħeinami.
S.FORM: kiya ka wadamiyan mtengi tikuh malu heinami di ge um heinami.
S.PHON: kija ka wadamijan mteŋi tikuħ malu ħeinami di ge um ħeinami.
S.TRANSL: 因此我們吃飽了一些,我們身體也好一點.
Thus we were slightly filled, and our bodies became better.

S.FORM: ma kndalax mccebu tanah tunux di meyah taywang hini somiyan hari kojiki.
S.PHON: ma kndalax mʦʦebu tanaħ tunux di mejaħ tajwaŋ ħini somijan ħaɾi kojiki.
S.FORM: ma kndalax mccebu tanah tunux di meyah taywang hini somiyan hari kojiki.
S.PHON: ma kndalax mʦʦebu tanaħ tunux di mejaħ tajwaŋ ħini somijan ħaɾi kojiki.
S.TRANSL: 自從日本人打仗,來台灣之後,我們生活像乞丐一樣.
Since the Japanese people started the war and came to Taiwan we had lived like beggars.

S.FORM: ukamiyan mmaanu uka lukus.
S.PHON: ukamijan mmaanu uka lukus.
S.FORM: ukamiyan mmaanu uka lukus.
S.PHON: ukamijan mmaanu uka lukus.
S.TRANSL: 我們什麼都沒有,也沒有衣服.
We had nothing, not even clothes.

S.FORM: ma baka naq maanu ka lukusnami icimai icaku bale lukusmiyan hetai ma.
S.PHON: ma baka naq maanu ka lukusnami iʦimai iʦaku bale lukusmijan ħetai ma.
S.FORM: ma baka naq maanu ka lukusnami icimai icaku bale lukusmiyan hetai ma.
S.PHON: ma baka naq maanu ka lukusnami iʦimai iʦaku bale lukusmijan ħetai ma.
S.TRANSL: 我們衣服怎麼夠?我們的軍服就只有一套.
How were our clothes enough? We only had one military uniform.

S.FORM: nimai bale satu ma gonengkan klukusun kiya do.
S.PHON: nimai bale satu ma goneŋkan klukusun kija do.
S.FORM: nimai bale satu ma gonengkan klukusun kiya do.
S.PHON: nimai bale satu ma goneŋkan klukusun kija do.
S.TRANSL: 兩件上衣穿了五年.
Two shirts to wear for five years.

S.FORM: uka wada sgaliq di.
S.PHON: uka wada sgaliq di.
S.FORM: uka wada sgaliq di.
S.PHON: uka wada sgaliq di.
S.TRANSL: 沒有了,都破了.
There was nothing. All were ragged.

S.FORM: sonoaidaniL2LJ dungan do a mbberasmiyan uka lukus.
S.PHON: sonoaidanil*l* duŋan do a mbbeɾasmijan uka lukus.
S.FORM: sonoaidaniL2LJ dungan do a mbberasmiyan uka lukus.
S.PHON: sonoaidanil*l* duŋan do a mbbeɾasmijan uka lukus.
S.TRANSL: 那段時間我們再一次變成裸體,沒有衣服了.
During that time we were naked again. We had no cloth.

S.FORM: hanimiyan musa mccebu do kingal bale handosi musa mccebu.
S.PHON: ħanimijan musa mʦʦebu do kiŋal bale ħandosi musa mʦʦebu.
S.FORM: hanimiyan musa mccebu do kingal bale handosi musa mccebu.
S.PHON: ħanimijan musa mʦʦebu do kiŋal bale ħandosi musa mʦʦebu.
S.TRANSL: 剛開始,我們去打仗只穿著兜襠布.
In the beginning, we went to the war only in loincloth.

S.FORM: ani kana seediq wada huqin da a wada cebuun de a dame doriq do.
S.PHON: ani kana seediq wada ħuqin da a wada ʦebuun de a dame doɾiq do.
S.FORM: ani kana seediq wada huqin da a wada cebuun de a dame doriq do.
S.PHON: ani kana seediq wada ħuqin da a wada ʦebuun de a dame doɾiq do.
S.TRANSL: 即使是被美國人射死的人.
Even people who were shot and killed by Americans.

S.FORM: wada mbberas kana uka lukus.
S.PHON: wada mbbeɾas kana uka lukus.
S.FORM: wada mbberas kana uka lukus.
S.PHON: wada mbbeɾas kana uka lukus.
S.TRANSL: 全部都是已經裸體了,沒有衣服.
All were already naked, without clothes.

S.FORM: so kiya ka ndaanmu krusi riyung cbeyo a ndaanmu.
S.PHON: so kija ka ndaanmu kɾusi ɾijuŋ ʦbejo a ndaanmu.
S.FORM: so kiya ka ndaanmu krusi riyung cbeyo a ndaanmu.
S.PHON: so kija ka ndaanmu kɾusi ɾijuŋ ʦbejo a ndaanmu.
S.TRANSL: 我像那樣過去的經歷非常痛苦.
My experience like that in the past was very painful.

S.FORM: kndalax menaq hini tah tunux cbeyo.
S.PHON: kndalax menaq ħini taħ tunux ʦbejo.
S.FORM: kndalax menaq hini tah tunux cbeyo.
S.PHON: kndalax menaq ħini taħ tunux ʦbejo.
S.TRANSL: 從日本殖民政府以前佔據台灣開始.
It began with the Japanese occupation here in the past.

S.FORM: e e saya da rudanku nak da iniku nak lngelung mmaanu di.
S.PHON: e e saja da ɾudanku nak da iniku nak lŋeluŋ mmaanu di.
S.FORM: e e saya da rudanku nak da iniku nak lngelung mmaanu di.
S.PHON: e e saja da ɾudanku nak da iniku nak lŋeluŋ mmaanu di.
S.TRANSL: 今天,我已經老了.我任何事情都不想了.
Today, I am already old. I do not think about anything.
